def positive_reinvented_utility():
    rule_id = "reinvented_utility"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Obvious locally implemented utility helpers that overlap with already-imported standard-library style helpers."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
